heading: This Afternoon
text: Sun filtering through high clouds north. Mostly cloudy south, with the chance of a sprinkle far south. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s north, and mid 70s to around 80 south, except some lower 70s far south. Winds variable to east at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy south; partly cloudy north. Showers likely near the Massachusetts border, mainly late, a rising chance north to Route 4. Lows in the upper 50s to lower 60s. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast, except southeast 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Partly to mostly sunny northwest, otherwise clouds decreasing in the afternoon, except remain mostly cloudy southeast. Chance of showers from Route 4 southward, except likely in Windham County and in far southern New Hampshire. Highs in the low to mid 70s in the south, some upper 70s in the Hudson Valley, and upper 70s to mid 80s north. East to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.
